steps.title: Compare consecutive changes
steps.content:
The table values increase by the same amount each time $x$ increases by $1$:

$$16,17,18,19$$

The constant increase shows a linear pattern, and the values are going up.

steps.title: Name the function type
steps.content: Because the rate of change is constant and positive, the function is increasing linear.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Enter the table values and inspect the constant first differences. The answer is B.
